CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EMSI ENGINEERING, INC. POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ONE PROMARK 3 ( 2 RECEIVER SET) ONE PROMARK 3 SINGLE RECEIVER, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $13,317.27 DAMAGES, $1,675.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $355.00 COSTS, $142.35 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,489.62, FAIR MARKET VALUE $ 4,500.00 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
